about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: The story behind MaCaoFun
about.missionText: Built for visitors to Macao — so you never miss a show, exhibition, or festival worth experiencing.
about.feature1Desc: Hand-picked concerts, exhibitions, and festivals — only the best Macao has to offer.
about.feature2Desc: Real-time countdowns so you know exactly when tickets go on sale and can grab them first.
about.feature3Desc: Designed for travellers to Macao. Plan your trip around the events that matter most to you.
